summary: Backend-only testing of Admin Scenario completed successfully. 34/34 tests passed. All admin API endpoints tested comprehensively.

notes.note: Has rate limiting (429) after ~10 requests per minute - this is expected security behavior
notes.impact: None - tests use cached token to avoid rate limiting

critical_code_review_comments: All admin endpoints properly require authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated requests)
Access control working correctly - customers (user_type='buyer') get 403 when accessing admin endpoints
Rate limiting on login endpoint is working (429 after too many requests)
Coupon CRUD operations working correctly (endpoints at /api/coupons/admin/*)
Commission rates and reports working correctly
Platform settings (both public and admin-only) working correctly
Food stores and stats endpoints working correctly
seed_data_creation: TEST_sub-admin and TEST_coupon created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 scenarios tested successfully: Seller (iteration_83), Driver (iteration_84), Customer (iteration_85), Admin (iteration_86). Coupon endpoints are at /api/coupons/admin/list and /api/coupons/admin/create (not /api/admin/coupons).

admin_login.notes: Admin login works with correct credentials. Token returned in 'token' field.

admin_stats.notes: Returns all expected stats fields: total_users, total_sellers, total_delivery, total_products, total_orders, pending_sellers, pending_products, pending_delivery, total_sub_admins

auth_required_check.notes: All admin endpoints return 401/403 without authentication

user_management.notes: Returns list of users with user_type='buyer'

delivery_management.notes: All delivery driver management endpoints working

categories.notes: Returns list of categories with id, name, and type fields

featured_stores.notes: Featured stores settings working with enabled and store_ids fields

coupons.notes: Coupon CRUD working. Note: endpoints are at /api/coupons/admin/*, not /api/admin/coupons

commissions.notes: Commission reports and rates endpoints working

access_control.notes: Customers (user_type='buyer') correctly denied access to admin endpoints with 403
